High-ranking white-bear-clan female guard design lock

costume, prop, and northern material handoff for human round face, round bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, white bear fur mantle, silver-black bone-iron armor, bronze bracers, bone-iron shield, guard axe, jade clasp, red oath cord, and ice-stud boots
assets.qc_summary: Pass: final board reads as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female guard with a human round face, bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, and elite heavy guard equipment. It avoids both rejected directions: v001 Frosthoof deer guard and v002 bear-face beast-head guard. The locked Wanshou emblem is not redesigned; northern symbol language remains object/material-based.
